'''fayadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qinah|qinah]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-y-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qinah|qinah]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fayadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæyædhæth|fæyædhæth]] || [[word:fæyædhæj|fæyædhæj]] || [[word:fæyædhæsh|fæyædhæsh]] || [[word:fæyædhæ|fæyædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fayayadhath|fayayadhath]] || [[word:fayayadhaj|fayayadhaj]] || [[word:fayayadhash|fayayadhash]] || [[word:fayayadha|fayayadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fayadhath|fayadhath]] || [[word:fayadhaj|fayadhaj]] || [[word:fayadhash|fayadhash]] || [[word:fayadha|fayadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fayafdhath|fayafdhath]] || [[word:fayafdhaj|fayafdhaj]] || [[word:fayafdhash|fayafdhash]] || [[word:fayafdhaf|fayafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fayadhatha|fayadhatha]] || [[word:fayadhaja|fayadhaja]] || [[word:fayadhasha|fayadhasha]] || [[word:fayadhaka|fayadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fayadhath|fayadhath]] || [[word:fayadhaj|fayadhaj]] || [[word:fayadhash|fayadhash]] || [[word:fayadha|fayadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fayadhathal|fayadhathal]] || [[word:fayadhajal|fayadhajal]] || [[word:fayadhashal|fayadhashal]] || [[word:fayadhakal|fayadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fayadhathatha|fayadhathatha]] || [[word:fayadhajaja|fayadhajaja]] || [[word:fayadhashasha|fayadhashasha]] || [[word:fayadhaka|fayadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fayadhathan|fayadhathan]] || [[word:fayadhajan|fayadhajan]] || [[word:fayadhashan|fayadhashan]] || [[word:fayadhakan|fayadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fayadhathaoro|fayadhathaoro]] || [[word:fayadhajaoro|fayadhajaoro]] || [[word:fayadhashaoro|fayadhashaoro]] || [[word:fayadhakaoro|fayadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
